reason: historical attempt import from vela-science/erdos-frontier@121807e20b06eb8148f594dfe13e440181252b0f:attack/attempt-ledger.v2.json (provenance, not a verdict)

attempt.claim: Growing-cycle construction (cross-model verified) ESCAPES the 2-aux no-go: produces fresh 1/b certificates avoiding ANY prescribed set of small primes (verified for b=6,30,42,66,70,105 forbidding all primes up to 10/20/50/100). #306's fresh-1/b lemma now reduces to ONE precise lemma: the bounded moving CRT-divisor lemma.
depends_on: OPEN: bounded moving CRT-divisor lemma — one of C_k+1 positions R+h*m (0<=h<=C_k) must be a fresh prime divisor of M; not reachable by Dirichlet or largest-prime-factor. This is the precise remaining gap.
attempt.detail: Cycle cone: q_1->...->q_k->q_1, local congruence at q_j is C_j + b(q_{j-1}^{-1}+q_{j+1}^{-1}) ≡ 0 mod q_j (only cycle-neighbours, so NOT a fixed hyperbola). Internal vertices have Dirichlet freedom; the obstruction is CLOSURE: q_k must satisfy two CRT classes (q_k ≡ R mod m, m=q_1 q_{k-1}) AND divide M=C_k q_{k-1} q_1 + b(q_{k-1}+q_1). Since M/m = C_k + b/q_1 + b/q_{k-1} < C_k+1, q_k = R+h*m for only 0<=h<=C_k candidates — a BOUNDED moving CRT-divisor problem, NOT Dirichlet/S-unit. Height control (proven): if F forbids all primes <=Y then cycle length k must grow >= Y/C_max — fixed k is provably insufficient. VERIFIED: 6 explicit cycle certs sum exactly to 1/b, distinct semiprimes, all aux primes past the cutoff (e.g. 1/105 all aux >100). REMAINING GAP: prove one of the C_k+1 candidates R+h*m is a fresh prime divisor of M (the bounded moving CRT divisor lemma). Construction WORKS empirically; only the universal-existence proof is open. #306 OPEN but this is the live path.
attempt.insight: independent Opus verification: all 6 growing-cycle certs (b=6,30,42,66,70,105) exact-rational + distinct semiprimes + every auxiliary prime above the forbidden cutoff.

provenance.proposer: GPT-5.5 Pro (growing-cycle round), verified by Opus

attempt.reusable_for: growing/cyclic cone certificates; bounded moving CRT prime-divisor problems; fresh Egyptian-fraction constructions avoiding a forbidden prime set

caveats: A signed banked attempt. Trust is earned via its verifier_attachments + the gate, never from claimed_status.
